content.query:
v-------------------
-- CREATE MASTER KEY
--------------------

CREATE MASTER KEY ENCRYPTION BY PASSWORD ='Pmngr.@5500'

---------------------------
-- CREATE MANANGED IDENTITY
---------------------------

CREATE DATABASE SCOPED CREDENTIAL azure_cred
WITH
IDENTITY = 'Managed Identity'

---------------------------------------------
-- CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE (SILVER LAYER)
---------------------------------------------

CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE source_silver
WITH
(location = 'https://pmnadlsdatalake.blob.core.windows.net/silver/',
CREDENTIAL = azure_cred);

-------------------------------------------
-- CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE (GOLD LAYER)
-------------------------------------------

CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE source_gold
WITH
(location = 'https://pmnadlsdatalake.blob.core.windows.net/gold/',
CREDENTIAL = azure_cred);

------------------------------
-- CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT
------------------------------

CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT format_parquet
WITH
(FORMAT_TYPE = parquet,
DATA_COMPRESSION = 'org.apache.hadoop.io.compress.SnappyCodec');

-----------------------------------
-- CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE USING CTAS
-----------------------------------

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE gold.extsales
WITH
(LOCATION = 'extsales/',
DATA_SOURCE = source_gold,
FILE_FORMAT = format_parquet
)
AS
SELECT * FROM gold.sales;

---------------------------------
-- FETCH RECORD OF EXTERNAL TABLE
---------------------------------

select * from gold.extsales;
